description: Qwen-Image-Edit 2509 with 2 reference images — compose a scene preserving identities from both
prompt_guide: Write a composition instruction that tells the model how to combine the two reference images into one scene. Example: 'Place the character from image 1 inside the environment from image 2, preserving each subject's identity and style.' Reference images by role (character, location, prop) rather than 'image 1 / image 2' when possible. Keep instructions concise. CRITICAL: never ask for readable text, typography, logos, or lettering — treat icons as silhouettes, not lettered labels.
